name: Breezy Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream the sugar and butter. Add the eggs and salt; beat well.
2. Stir in the chocolate syrup, flour, and pecans. Pour into a greased 13-inch x 9-inch x 2-inch baking pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes. Cool for 15 minutes.
4. For frosting, combine sugar, butter, and milk in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, stirring frequently.
5. Boil for 1 minute; remove from the heat and stir in chocolate chips until melted.
6. Beat to spreading consistency, about 3 minutes. Add pecans and frost warm brownies.
